what: FlyDSL t16x128x128_atomic stage2 for d=2048 (smaller tile_n=128 with tile_m=16)
why: v134 showed tile_m=16 helps d=2048. v52 showed tile_n=128 beat tile_n=256 for d=2048. Combining both: t16x128x128 may give best of both (more M-parallelism + smaller tile_n).
override: New tile combination t16x128x128 never tried. v53 was t32x128x128 which crashed before _KERNEL_PARAMS fix. v134 used t16x256x128 successfully, so tile_m=16 works. This reduces tile_n from 256 to 128.
